channel.title: netflow on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in netflow on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Install Elasticflow
item.description: How to install Elasticflow Today, i found a good software that is Elasticflow. It is so perfect for us to monitor status of our networking. So I tried to install it will docker-compose way. You know what, after servial hours, fixed a lot bugs it works. Download and modified docker-compose.yml for elasticflow # Download `docker-compose.yml` for elasticflow wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/robcowart/elastiflow/master/docker-compose.yml # version 3.5.2 is now existed. So we need change it to `3.
